headline: 2 Big Agriculture Operations Stocks to Buy Despite Recent Headwinds
summary: ADM and CTVA stand out as top agriculture picks, leveraging innovation, pricing strength and product demand to navigate industry headwinds.

headline: Argus is Bullish on Corteva, Inc. (CTVA)
summary: Corteva, Inc. (NYSE:CTVA) is one of the 11 Biggest Agriculture Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 31, 2026, Argus analyst Alexandra Yates upgraded Corteva, Inc. (NYSE:CTVA)’s price objective to $91 from $80 while retaining a Buy rating. The analyst noted solid execution, demand strength, and expected margin improvement driven by cost cuts and pricing […]

headline: Could Corteva’s (CTVA) Earnings Beat Streak Reshape Its Long-Term Investment Narrative?
summary: In recent days, Corteva has continued its run of positive quarterly earnings surprises, with the company outperforming consensus expectations in each of the last four reported periods and earning broadly favorable analyst ratings. This pattern of consistent outperformance and upbeat earnings estimate revisions has reinforced confidence among both institutional and individual investors in Corteva’s current execution. We'll now examine how Corteva's consistent earnings outperformance and...
